name: Brown-Eyed Susans
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, bran, baking powder, salt and spices in a large bowl.
2. Add the brown sugar and mix until no lumps remain.
3. Stir in the chocolate chips.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the beaten egg, milk, oil and pumpkin pie filling until well combined.
5. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened. Do not overmix.
6. Spoon the batter into greased muffin tins, filling each about 2/3 full.
7. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes. Remove from the pan and let cool.
